entity: Larry Bird 60 PTS vs Atlanta Hawks on 1985-03-12 (BOS 126-115; the only 60-point game in Celtics history at the time, achieved on a 22-of-36 shooting night)

query_target.sql: SELECT player_name, team_abbreviation, game_date, pts, reb, ast, season_year FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE player_name = 'Larry Bird' AND game_date = '1985-03-12' AND pts = 60 LIMIT 1

notes: Retired player; match:containsObject with exact values. The 60-point game is pre-1996-97, so fact_player_game_log doesn't have it; analytics_player_game_complete covers the full historical back to 1946. Bird was famously one of the last players off the bench for this game (he had been ill the night before).
